text: Bitcoin and Ethereum are both posting modest gains despite extreme fear sentiment, suggesting selective buying into weakness rather than broad conviction. Bitcoin's 2.5% outpace over Ethereum's 2.2% is pushing dominance higher at 55.8%, indicating capital rotating back toward the safest assets. The $86B in daily volume and Fear & Greed improvement from 12 to 19 over a week point to capitulation-driven stabilization rather than a rally fueled by demand.
